name: Shopify
description: Full Admin API access: products, orders, customers, inventory, analytics (75 tools)
longDescription: Community Shopify MCP server (aserper/shopify-mcp) providing complete Admin GraphQL API coverage with 75 tools for products, orders, customers, inventory, collections, discounts, analytics, fulfillment, and more. Supports both static access tokens and OAuth client credentials. Built-in cost-aware rate limiting.
author: aserper

apiKeyConfig.label: Shopify Admin API Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a Custom App in Shopify Admin > Settings > Apps > Develop apps, enable Admin API scopes

examplePrompts: List all products with low inventory
Create a new product with variants
Show me orders from the last 7 days
Get customer lifetime value for customer 123
Run a ShopifyQL query for sales by month
